case_title: NICOLAS N BERVELL VS. THE SAN FRANCISCO PARTICULAR COUNCIL OF THE SOCIETY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERVELL, NICOLAS N AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO PARTICULAR COUNCIL OF THE SOCIETY OF ST. VINCENT DE PAUL DBA MULTI SERVICE CENTER (MSC - SOUTH)

NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF WAS INFORMED THAT THE CERTIFIED MAILING OF THE CLAIM WAS RETURNED TO THE COURT UNSERVED. THE PLAINTIFF WAS INFORMED THAT HE COULD HAVE A CONTINUANCE BUT LEFT WITHOUT A NEW DATE. PLAINTIFF NICOLAS BERVELL IS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/14/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERVELL, NICOLAS N ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY BERVELL, NICOLAS N AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO PARTICULAR COUNCIL OF THE SOCIETY OF ST. VINCENT DE PAUL DBA MULTI SERVICE CENTER (MSC - SOUTH) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
